description: Kubernetes environments now support first-class Ingress (networking.k8s.io/v1) and Gateway API (gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1) resources. Use AddIngress() or AddGateway() on a KubernetesEnvironmentResource or AzureKubernetesEnvironmentResource with fluent WithRoute(), WithTls(), and WithIngressClass()/WithGatewayClass() APIs to declaratively configure HTTP routing when deploying to Kubernetes.
name: Kubernetes Ingress and Gateway API routing resources
